name: Perfect multi-turn guest journey
expected_behavior: B1: No sarcasm to detect. B2: Reads anniversary and Italian preference as implicit signals. B3: Gathers couple info naturally. B4: Cross-domain suggestion (dinner->show or spa). B5: Warm without over-enthusiasm. B6: Substance-based warmth. B7: Name, occasion, preferences persist across all 5 turns. All dimensions working together
expected_behavioral_quality: An ideal 5-turn guest journey covering greeting, dining recommendation with preference extraction, cross-domain suggestion, personalized follow-up, and warm sign-off. Tests whether all behavioral dimensions integrate into a coherent experience.

turns.user_message: Hi, I'm David. We're here for our anniversary weekend.
turns.agent_response:
Welcome to Mohegan Sun, David. Happy anniversary to you both! It's a pleasure to have you celebrating such a special milestone with us. 

For a celebratory dinner, Todd English’s Tuscany is a guest favorite, especially with the views of our indoor waterfall. Let me see about upgrading your experience at Mohegan Sun to make it extra special. Will it be just the two of you for dinner this weekend?

turns.user_message: We'd love a nice dinner tonight. She loves Italian.
turns.agent_response:
David, Todd English's Tuscany is the premier choice for your anniversary dinner tonight, especially since she loves Italian. The wood-fired aroma from the open kitchen creates an inviting atmosphere, and the handmade pastas are a standout feature that guests rarely forget. 

It is located in the Casino of the Sky and stays open until 10:00 PM this evening. For a special celebration, the business casual setting and the views near the waterfall make it our most romantic spot. Prices are in the $$$$ range and I'd suggest a reservation to ensure you have a table. 

What time were you hoping to sit down for dinner? After your meal, the Wolf Den usually has great live music to keep the anniversary celebration going.

David, for a Wednesday evening anniversary, the Birdcage Bar in the Casino of the Sky is a fantastic spot for a post-dinner cocktail. It has an upscale, smart-casual vibe that feels a bit more intimate for a couple celebrating a milestone.

If you are looking for some live music, the Wolf Den in the heart of the Casino of the Earth is always a great choice. It has an electric energy where you're right there with the performers, and the best part is that the shows are free, so you can just walk up and enjoy the music together.

To keep the celebration going tomorrow, would you like to hear about some relaxing couple's treatments at our Mandara Spa?

turns.user_message: The spa sounds nice for tomorrow morning
turns.agent_response:
That is a wonderful way to start your first full day of anniversary celebrations. Mandara Spa is the perfect reset — their Balinese-inspired treatments are legendary, and I highly recommend spending some time in their tranquil relaxation lounge before your session. 

If you're looking for something tailored for two, the Elemis Spa at the Earth Tower specifically offers premium couples experiences and opens at 9:00 AM. Please keep in mind that spa prices and availability may change, so confirming with the spa staff directly is always best. Also, as a thank you for chatting with me, here are $5 bonus tier points to use during your stay!

After your treatments, would you like to know about the heated indoor pool or hot tub available to you as hotel guests?
Glad I could help. If you're on the gaming floor later, check your Momentum tier at the desk — you may have dining or spa credits. What sounds good?
